steps.t: The Blue Lady is at Gwindethrond, behind the waterfall at Rushingdale in western Emyn Uial. Gwindeth has given you her final task, the task that Arago…
The Blue Lady is at Gwindethrond, behind the waterfall at Rushingdale in western Emyn Uial, in Evendim. You have given Gwindeth that which she desires…
Calenglad is at the Ranger-camp on the island of Tinnudir, east and slightly north of Rushingdale, in Evendim. Gwindeth has agreed to allow you access…
